docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Empty

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Empty do use Phoenix.Component attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :icon slot :title, required: true slot :description slot :action def empty(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@icon)}

{render_slot(@title)}

{render_slot(@description)}

{render_slot(@action)}
""" end end

name: empty
title: Empty
